ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Status__c ), ISPICKVAL(Status__c , 'For Pricing Approval') , OR( ISBLANK( Quoted_Created__c ), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Quoted_Created__r.Status__c , 'Done')) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Missing or Not Complete quote. Can not proceed with 'For Pricing Approval'.
